data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club grows Q2 digital sales 34%
data.description: More than 90% of digital orders were fulfilled through the company’s clubs, primarily via buy online, pick up in store (BOPIS), same-day delivery, and its ExpressPay checkout.

data.title: Pepper buys Kimelo to expand foodservice distribution tech platform
data.description: Kimelo, founded by technology veterans and led by CEO Kim Spalding, built one of the first restaurant supply apps designed to simplify daily purchasing for restaurants and strengthen connections with distributors.

data.title: Henry Schein One renews Worldpay deal to support digital payments
data.description: The payments technology ties into Henry Schein One’s broader digital offerings, which include tools such as its Eligibility Pro module for real-time insurance verification.

data.title: Lululemon appoints AI-focused executive in newly created role
data.description: The retailer is tasking him with "leading the company's technology organization and driving the development and execution of the next phase of lululemon’s technology and AI strategy."

data.title: Faire expands to New Zealand and 14 European countries
data.description: Since its European launch, Faire has processed more than 2 million orders across the continent, with retailers spending nearly $500 million.
